narrative: Markets enter the session with a clear dollar-bullish tone as the Fed rate decision looms, with traders pricing a hold but bracing for hawkish Powell rhetoric that could extend the DXY's grip near 99.00. Oil surging toward $100 on Iran blockade fears compounds pressure on energy importers, with USD/INR approaching all-time highs as FII outflows accelerate — a theme reinforcing broad USD strength. Technically, USD scores a perfect 100 on relative strength, and USDJPY's daily buy signal aligns cleanly with this macro-news convergence, making it the session's highest-conviction setup. USDCHF offers a secondary opportunity, with H4 momentum turning bullish despite CHF ranking at zero on strength metrics. One notable contradiction deserves attention: the technical regime reads Risk-On Medium, yet news flow is decisively risk-off — gold selling, crude surging, and equity jitters all point the other way, suggesting the technical regime signal may be stale or lagging. Watch USDJPY on the Powell presser for a momentum acceleration trigger.

themes.theme: Fed rate decision – expected hold with hawkish Powell signal risks
Oil surge toward $100 on Iran blockade fears pressuring oil-importing currencies
USD/INR approaching all-time highs on oil-driven FII outflows and energy import costs
BoC expected to hold rates amid Middle East conflict uncertainty and oil dynamics
Gold and silver selling off ahead of Fed, reflecting reduced easing expectations
AUD softer CPI tempers RBA hike expectations, mixed with AUD/NZD strength
Eurozone economic sentiment deteriorating with rising inflation expectations
AI/tech earnings jitters and surging crude weigh on risk sentiment
DXY holding near 99.00 – US exceptionalism narrative and flow support

key_observation: Surging oil prices toward $100 on Iran blockade fears are the dominant macro driver, simultaneously pressuring oil-importing EM currencies (INR at all-time high risk), clouding Fed easing expectations (supporting USD), and worsening Eurozone sentiment. Powell's likely farewell meeting is expected to deliver a hold with hawkish risk, reinforcing dollar support near 99.00.
watch: Fed statement tone and Powell press conference for any shift in easing timeline; WTI price action around $100 for escalation risk; USD/INR 95.23 level for potential RBI intervention; BoC decision for divergence signals on oil pass-through.
